title: Alignment attributes
description: Alignment attributes control where a component sits within its parent and how siblings are positioned relative to it. Most are inherited from Android's RelativeLayout vocabulary and apply inside Views that use a relative positioning mode.

data.name: alignBottom
data.summary: Aligns bottom edges.

data.name: alignBottomOfView
data.summary: Places this view directly below the referenced sibling.

data.name: alignBottomView
data.description: Align bottom edge with specified view
data.summary: Aligns bottom edges to a sibling.

data.name: alignCenterHorizontalView
data.description: Align horizontal center with specified view
data.summary: Centers this view horizontally within a sibling's horizontal bounds.

data.name: alignCenterVerticalView
data.description: Align vertical center with specified view
data.summary: Centers this view vertically within a sibling's vertical bounds.

data.name: alignLeft
data.summary: Aligns left edges.

data.name: alignLeftOfView
data.description: Align to right of specified view ID
data.summary: Places this view directly to the left of the referenced sibling.

data.name: alignLeftView
data.description: Align left edge with specified view
data.summary: Aligns left edges to a sibling.

data.name: alignRight
data.summary: Aligns right edges.

data.name: alignRightOfView
data.description: Align to left of specified view ID
data.summary: Places this view directly to the right of the referenced sibling.

data.name: alignRightView
data.description: Align right edge with specified view
data.summary: Aligns right edges to a sibling.

data.name: alignTop
data.summary: Boolean. Aligns this view's top edge to its parent's top edge.

data.name: alignTopOfView
data.summary: Places this view directly above the referenced sibling (this view's bottom = sibling's top).

data.name: alignTopView
data.description: Align top edge with specified view
data.summary: Aligns this view's top to the top of a sibling View identified by ID. Value is the sibling's id string.

data.name: centerHorizontal
data.summary: Boolean. Centers horizontally in the parent.

data.name: centerInParent
data.description: Center both horizontally and vertically (binding supported)
data.summary: Boolean. When `true`, centers both horizontally and vertically within the parent.

data.name: centerVertical
data.summary: Boolean. Centers vertically in the parent.

data.name: gravity
data.summary: `left` / `center` / `right` / `top` / `bottom` / `center_horizontal` / `center_vertical` / `center_in_parent`. For a vertical View, horizontal gravity aligns children; for horizontal, vertical gravity aligns children.

platformDiff.swift_swiftui: HStack/VStack の alignment パラメータにマップ。
platformDiff.react: Tailwind の `justify-*` / `items-*` クラスに変換。

data.name: indexAbove
data.summary: Places this view visually above (higher z-index than) the referenced sibling.

data.name: indexBelow
data.summary: Places this view visually below the referenced sibling.
